scripts.deploy: npm run build && gcloud functions deploy ohm-token-exchange --gen2 --runtime=nodejs22 --trigger-http --allow-unauthenticated --entry-point=ohmTokenExchange --source=. --region=us-central1 --set-secrets=GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID=ohm-client-id:latest,GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET=ohm-client-secret:latest
